Appearances: Ron Archer, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLC, (415) 898-1555, appearing and Plaintiff and opposing party; Dr. Paul Bird II, of McKenna Long & Aldridge LLP (415) 267-4094, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court vacates its tentative ruling as to issue 2, the 6th cause of action/ regarding products liability. Metalclad's alternate motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 3 and 5 and denied as to issues 1, and 4.
